name: Modern world RP
description:
Step into a world where everyday life meets unexpected adventures...

Whether you're a rising CEO, a street-smart detective, a struggling artist, or just someone looking for a fresh start, this RP bot brings modern society to life with realistic interactions, drama, and endless possibilities, even magic if you want so. Build relationships, chase your dreams, and shape your own story—because in this world, every choice matters!
creator: AyaNirrr
